title: Prodigy/Hasbro NERF Discs, MVP Massive Drop & More
excerpt: Prodigy launches 4 NERF soft flight discs; MVP coordinates massive May 13 drop; Innova Lynx relaunches.
author: DiscMill
content:
Disc Golf Daily Intelligence Brief
DiscMill — May 13, 2026

1. Daily Summary
Prodigy + Hasbro NERF partnership launches 4 PDGA-approved soft flight discs (driver, midrange, putter, ultimate) — ~100g weights, foam construction. A licensing milestone for Prodigy.
MVP/Axiom/Streamline massive coordinated release hitting brick-and-mortar stores May 13 (tomorrow), online May 15. Includes Neutron Stasis SE, Neutron Engine (stock release), Proton Reactor/Tesla/Virus OTB Open editions, and more.
Discraft 2026 Worlds discs now in retail stores (released May 1) — limited supply, includes Paul McBeth Tour Series Luna in Titanium/Big Z blend.
Innova Lynx relaunched — the renamed IT mold with adjusted flight (7/6/-3/1 vs. IT's 7/5/-2/1). Proto Glow Champion Lynx now stock-stamped.
Streamline Engine stock release now available — this was Eagle McMahon’s tour series, now widely accessible. Many players reporting it’s consistent with the Archetype run.
Champion Fox now in Champion plastic (was Team Champion only). Flight: 5/6/-2/1.
Latitude 64 "Mighty" dropping Thursday May 14 — new mold in Trilogy lineup.
Ohn Scoggins continues dominant 2026 season with wins at Open at Austin and WACO.
Innova Replay events ongoing across the country — casual format with 3-disc player packs.
2. New Mold Releases / Approvals
| Mold | Manufacturer | Category | Flight Numbers | Source |
|------|-------------|----------|----------------|--------|
| H6 | Prodigy | Distance Driver | — | Instagram |
| NERF Soft Flight (4 discs) | Prodigy × Hasbro | Various | ~100g | Reddit |
| Lynx | Innova | Fairway Driver | 7/6/-3/1 | Innova |
| Mighty | Latitude 64 | — | — | Drops May 14 |
| Neutron Stasis (SE) | MVP | Control Driver | 2/1/0/2.5 | Available May 13 |
| Stock Neutron Engine | Streamline | Fairway Driver | 7/5/-2/1 (approx.) | Reddit Review |

3. New Plastics / Special Runs / Limited Drops
Discraft 2026 Worlds — Paul McBeth Tour Series Luna in special Titanium/Big Z blend, Cyclone Special Blend, and other limited tour-series discs. Retail since May 1, supplies limited.
James Conrad 2026 Team Series — returning disc, limited release. Order now.
Innova Proto Glow Halo variants — Emily Weatherman, Fox (Iida Lehtomäki), Holly Finley, Garrett Gurthie, Kona Montgomery, Väinö Mäkelä tour series discs getting glow options.
Innova Glow C-Blend Chariot — new plastic variant for stable midrange.
Innova K3 Hard RekoX and Jarn — new plastics.
Limited Edition Innova Wraith — Swirled Star colorways with black foil, tone-on-tone, specialty foil options.
OTB Open Axiom Discs — Particle Proton Soft Rhythm (triple-foil), Proton Reactor, Proton Tesla, Proton Virus OTB Open editions.
MVP Stasis Special Edition — brick-and-mortar exclusive releasing May 13.
4. Pro Bag Changes & Sponsorship Notes
Paul McBeth — 2026 Tour Series Luna details shared. New special blend plastic (Titanium + Big Z mixture).
Eagle McMahon — Streamline Engine tour series → now stock release widely available.
Ohn Scoggins — Wins 2026 Open at Austin and WACO. Currently leads 2026 DGPT season in Scramble Rate and C1 Putting. Tied for 6th at Champions Cup.
Henna Blomroos — 2nd at 2026 Champions Cup, one stroke back of title. Led multiple driving/putting stats.
Team Innova 2026 roster released — Calvin Heimburg, Nate Sexton, Jennifer Allen, Ohn Scoggins, Eveliina Salonen, Henna Blomroos, Juliana Korver on Star Team; new Team Champion lineup also announced.
Supersonic Discs — new partner of Swedish Disc Golf Pro Tour for 2026.
Paul McBeth Foundation — launched "Throw for More" global one-day fundraiser for September (date TBD).
5. Retailer Drops / Restocks Worth Tracking
MVP/Axiom/Streamline drop — May 13 in stores, May 15 online. Massive coordinated release.
Discraft 2026 Worlds — available now in stores, limited supply.
Q-Line DD1 — back in stock at retailers.
Infinite Disc Golf — fresh Innova restock with Team Tour Series and glow variants.
Latitude 64 Mighty — drops May 14 at retailers.
Russell Disc Golf — new arrivals including Discraft Buzzz SS 2026 Worlds Edition, Innova Destroyer Duo 2026 Calvin Heimburg Tour Series, Discmania FD1 C-Line First Run.
6. Rumors, Leaks, or Prototype Sightings
No major rumors or leaks detected today. Most releases are officially announced.
Reddit discussion noted "Captain's Caliber" designed for Cade Costanzo with Discraft — likely a signature series.
7. Flight Number Corrections or Contradictions
Innova Lynx (formerly IT): Turn adjusted from -2 to -3. Flight now 7/6/-3/1 (was IT: 7/5/-2/1).
No other significant flight number corrections identified today.

title: Paul Ulibarri Wins at Austin, NERF Discs PDGA Approved
excerpt: Paul Ulibarri takes the Barbasol Open at Austin. Innova announces FL mold, plus more MVP/Axiom updates.
author: DiscMill
content:
Disc Golf Daily Intelligence Brief — May 12, 2026
1. Daily Summary
Prodigy NERF Soft Flight line PDGA-approved May 11 — Partnership with Hasbro yields foam discs (Ultimate, Driver, Putter + another model) that are legal for competitive play
Paul Ulibarri (Discraft) wins 2026 Open at Austin — DGPT Co-Captain takes down the Barbasol Open at Austin; Holyn Handley wins FPO
Innova FL announced as New Mold Monday (May 11) — Longer, straighter Firebird-type mold; first look video posted
MVP/Axiom 2026 OTB Open Wave 2 drops — Proton Tesla, Axiom Soft Proton Proxy, and other team-series discs released
Discmania DD4 Swirl S-Line Prototype — New Originals mold confirmed via EO2026 fundraiser
Discraft Ledgestone Season 2 Wave 2 underway — Molds include Avenger SS, Archer, Drone, Zone, Undertaker, Force, Buzzz OS, Nuke SS, Crush, Machete, Challenger OS
DGA TS Swirl Quake — Sullivan Tipton 2026 Tour Series — 5/3/0/3 overstable midrange released
Prodigy NERF discs: ~100g foam, denser than Elevation/Blowfly/Woodchuck — Will still sting if hit, PDGA approved despite soft construction
2. New Mold Releases / Approvals
| Mold | Manufacturer | Category | Flight Numbers | Notes |
|------|-------------|----------|---------------|-------|
| NERF Ultimate | Prodigy | Distance Driver | — | Speed 11; approved May 11, 2026 |
| NERF Driver | Prodigy | Driver | — | Approved May 11, 2026 |
| NERF Putter | Prodigy | Putter | — | Approved May 11, 2026 |
| FL | Innova | Fairway Driver | — | New Mold Monday (May 11); straighter Firebird |
| DD4 | Discmania | Distance Driver | — | Swirl S-Line Prototype; EO2026 fundraiser |
| Testi Lento Caliber | Discraft | Captain's Mold | — | Seppo Paju collaboration; commemorative release |
| Tesla | MVP | Fairway Driver | — | Proton version (2026 OTB Open) |
| Proxy (Soft) | Axiom | Fairway Driver | — | Proton Soft version (2026 OTB Open) |

Source: PDGA NERF Approvals | Reddit r/discgolf

3. New Plastics / Special Runs / Limited Drops
Prodigy NERF Soft Flight — Foam construction with patented soft foam; partnership with Hasbro; 4-disc lineup
Discraft Ledgestone Season 2 Wave 2 — Full foil Zone, CryZtal Confetti Undertaker, Ti Colorshift Stratus, Z Confetti Captain's Raptor
MVP/Axiom Particle Glow Soft Proton — UV-glow particles in Rhythm ("Wings" stamp) and Hex ("Vibes" stamp)
MVP Eclipse Electron Watt — Special Edition Prototype with glow capabilities; straight-flying putter
Axiom Fission Delirium — 14.5/5/-0.5/3; OTB Open 2026; Green C Studios artwork
DGA TS Swirl Quake — Sullivan Tipton 2026 Tour Series; limited run
Discmania DD4 Swirl S-Line Prototype — EO2026 fundraiser exclusive; only 1 produced per run
Source: Infinite Discs Blog | Powergrip 2026 OTB Open

4. Pro Bag Changes & Sponsorship Notes
Paul Ulibarri wins 2026 Open at Austin — Discraft team captain takes the W; Gannon Buhr used MVP Hex on lead card; Niklas Anttila wins MPO at -34 (not Ulibarri — different event)
Holyn Handley wins FPO at Open at Austin with -1 total; ahead of Kristin Lätt and Ohn Scoggins
Paul McBeth — Luna tour series active; no major bag changes reported
James Conrad — MVP Fission Trail (Team Series) released; 10-speed driver with microbubble tech
Jeremy Koling — Axiom Cosmic Neutron Tempo (Team Series); 4/4/0/2.5
Source: DGPT 2026 Open at Austin | StatMando

5. Retailer Drops / Restocks Worth Tracking
Infinite Discs — Large shipment of 250+ MVP discs in stock; Bodanza Scepter restock notable
Infinite Prototypes — 3 new prototype discs in testing; feedback being collected on which should go to production
Marshall Street Disc Golf — TS Swirl Quake released; DGA midrange
OTB Discs — Fission Delirium available; limited stock
Dolfin Discs — MVP Drop April 2026; Axiom Prism Neutron Panic (5 per store, 1 per customer limit)
Ledgestone Store — Full Foil Zone sold out; Season 2 ongoing
Source: Infinite Prototype Article | Marshall Street

6. Rumors, Leaks, or Prototype Sightings
Discmania DD4 — Confirmed via EO2026 fundraiser; not yet in full production
Innova FL — Leaked via New Mold Monday Instagram reel; likely releasing soon
MVP Control Prototype — OTB East posted tease for tonight (May 11); Axiom Aspect prototype also teased
Q-Line FD — Discmania re-engineered flight plate; more weight toward rim for enhanced glide
7. Flight Number Corrections or Contradictions
No major contradictions detected in last 24 hours. All new releases have consistent flight numbers per manufacturer specs.

title: Westside Vellamo & DD4, Discmania Cloud Breaker Released
excerpt: Westside Discs drops the new Vellamo midrange and DD4 distance driver. Simon Lizotte’s Neutron Balance hits stores.
author: Zo
content:
Disc Golf Daily Intelligence Brief — May 10, 2026
1. Daily Summary
Westside Discs dropped two new Originals line molds — the Vellamo midrange (5/5.5/0/1.5) and the DD4 distance driver (13/5/-1/3) — both on May 4th. DD4 is first-ever release and a much-requested addition to the line.
Discmania released the 2026 Cloud Breaker (DD3 retool) in Horizon Q-Line plastic on May 4th alongside Gannon Buhr's Signature Series.
Discraft's 2026 PDGA Worlds fundraiser discs landed at retailers May 1st with limitedcollector runs — including Nate Doss CryZtal Buzzz and Ezra Robinson's "Peach Pirate" Midnight Cigarra.
Axiom/MVP released the Neutron Balance (Simon Line, 5/5/0/2) — Simon Lizotte's latest stock-release midrange joining the Pixel and Time-Lapse.
Lightning Discs retooled the Rubber Putter with improved rubber blends, back in production May 9th.
Ran Disc Golf dropped a Trash Panda retailer-exclusive in recycled orange metal flake plastic — grippy, slightly more stable than stock.
A wave of 2026 Tour Series releases hit retailers this week from Prodigy and Discraft (Ledgestone edition), alongside new Gregg Barsby Duo Roadrunner from Innova.
2. New Mold Releases / Approvals
| Mold | Manufacturer | Category | Flight Numbers | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Vellamo | Westside Discs | Midrange | 5 / 5.5 / 0 / 1.5 | VIP first-run released May 4 |
| DD4 | Westside Discs | Distance Driver | 13 / 5 / -1 / 3 | First-ever release; Originals line |
| Cloud Breaker (DD3 retool) | Discmania | Distance Driver | Overstable 12-speed | 2026 Q-Line Horizon Premier; Gannon Buhr Signature |
| Neutron Balance | Axiom (MVP) | Midrange | 5 / 5 / 0 / 2 | Simon Lizotte Simon Line; stock release |
| OG Sabre | Gateway Discs | Midrange | Neutral | Revived 1999 mold; Gateway "Disc of the Week" May 9 |
| Trash Panda | Dynamic Discs (Trilogy) | Midrange | 8 / 6 / -3 / 1 | Retailer-exclusive run (Ran DG); recycled metal flake |

3. New Plastics / Special Runs / Limited Drops
Discraft 2026 PDGA Worlds Fundraiser (retailer release May 1): Nate Doss CryZtal Buzzz, Ezra Robinson "Peach Pirate" Midnight Cigarra, CT Swirl Focus (special AB stamp), and additional tour-series fundraiser discs — very limited quantities.
Discmania Cloud Breaker 2026 Q-Line Premier: Horizon plastic with new tech; overstable 12-speed distance driver.
Gannon Buhr 2026 Signature Series Cloud Breaker: Premier Horizon plastic, 5 stamp variants.
Westside Vellamo VIP First Run: Released May 4 — gripped VIP plastic.
Westside DD4 Prototype Swirl S-Line: European Open 2026 Fundraiser VIP run — first-ever DD4 release.
Trash Panda — Recycled Metal Flake (Orange): Retailer-exclusive via Ran Disc Golf; stiff, grippy recycled stock.
Prodigy 2026 Tour Series Spectrum: Multiple molds — A2 (overstable approach), PA-5, F9 400 Spectrum, and others with dramatic new colorways.
Innova Gregg Barsby Duo Roadrunner Tour Series 2026: Released early May.
Discraft Ledgestone Season Two: Full lineup of fundraiser discs restocked this week.
Lightning Rubber Putter retooled: Improved rubber blends; back in production May 9.
4. Pro Bag Changes & Sponsorship Notes
Simon Lizotte (Axiom/MVP): Stock release of the Neutron Balance — his third mold in the Simon Line (joining Pixel and Time-Lapse). Simon has been testing the Balance extensively before stock release.
Gannon Buhr (Discmania): 2026 Cloud Breaker Signature Series — 12-speed overstable distance driver.
Ezra Robinson (Discraft): Featured in Discraft 2026 Worlds fundraiser with "Peach Pirate" Midnight Cigarra.
Nate Doss (Discraft): CryZtal Buzzz Worlds edition fundraiser disc.
Gregg Barsby (Innova): Duo Roadrunner Tour Series 2026 released.
Pro tour feed from DGPT: Barbasol Open feature cards announced; lead card at The Open at Austin actively tracking.
5. Retailer Drops / Restocks Worth Tracking
Discraft 2026 Worlds discs: Available at DGPT Pro Shop, Blackink Discs, Disc Baron, local retailers since May 1. High demand, limited supply.
Westside Vellamo & DD4: Available WestsideDiscs.com since May 4; retailer trickle ongoing.
Discmania Cloud Breaker Q-Line: Discmania stores + online May 4; also at Armory DG, Pluto Sports.
Prodigy Tour Series Spectrum: Prodigy worldwide release May 7 — now hitting retail.
Axiom Neutron Balance: Stock release — available at Gotta Go Gotta Throw, Krokhol DGS, and MVP retailers.
Nexus Disc Golf: New releases from past week listed in-store and online May 9.
LWS Open fundraiser discs: 24 molds in-store, 12 online; more added daily.
6. Rumors, Leaks, or Prototype Sightings
A prototype disc from NADE (@nadhchrd) is slated for release Friday May 15 in limited quantities — mold identity unknown but teasing a new shape.
Community concern on X/Twitter about single-day in-person-only disc drops (likely a small custom shop run) — criticized for rewarding scalpers over average players.
Early excitement for an undisclosed Lightning Discs putter teased to arrive the week of May 11 — community buzz on X (Peridoughnut).
Discraft teased a "Captain's Caliber" Testi Lento — a new mold being tested by Seppo Paju and Clima Do; likely a Capri-inspired release.
7. Flight Number Corrections or Contradictions
Discmania Cloud Breaker: Officially described as a DD3 retool with updated tech for 2026 — expect slight flight character shift from prior DD3 runs. Not a new mold number, but effectively a retool of an established mold.
No major official flight number corrections announced from PDGA or manufacturers in the last 24h.
